summary: Support Pod V2 (Diagnose -> Decide -> Act Workflow) - All 10 features + P0 bug fix verified. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All 10 points verified with correct page layout order.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support Pod V2 fully tested at /support-pods/athlete_1. Key data-testid selectors: quick-actions-bar, active-issue-banner, urgency-badge, banner-recommended-action, banner-recommended-text, athlete-snapshot, recruiting-progress, snapshot-coach-engagement, pod-members, message-member-{role}, call-member-{role}, next-actions, show-all-actions, recruiting-intelligence, signal-{id}, intervention-playbook, playbook-toggle, playbook-step-{n}, ai-actions-btn (button text 'Get Coaching Suggestions'), recruiting-timeline, milestone-{id}, treatment-timeline, timeline-filter-{type}, qa-message, qa-log, qa-checkin, qa-escalate, qa-form, qa-input. DirectorActionsCard P0 bug fix verified in code - uses optimistic UI update with 2.5s delayed re-fetch.

P0_bug_fix_DirectorActionsCard.details: Code review confirms optimistic UI update (setActions) + delayed re-fetch (setTimeout 2500ms) in handleAcknowledge and handleResolve functions
